clean_headline: Ms Amee Joshi, Company Secretary, resigned from senior management position.
raw_headline:
The Exchange has sought clarification from Asahi India Glass Ltd on March 19, 2026, with reference to Movement in Volume.

The reply is awaited.

clean_headline: Lemon Tree Hotels signed a License Agreement for Lemon Tree Resort in Lonavala, Maharashtra, featuring 50 rooms and leisure facilities.
